name: Chargebee
description: Monitor Chargebee subscription billing for revenue compliance and customer data management

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Chargebee at https://app.chargebee.com
2. Go to Settings → Configure Chargebee → API Keys
3. Copy your Full-Access or Read-Only API key
4. Base64 encode 'api_key:' (with trailing colon, empty password)
5. Enter your site name and encoded key below

credentialFields.label: Site Name
credentialFields.helpText: Your Chargebee site name (e.g. mycompany — the subdomain of your Chargebee URL)

credentialFields.label: Encoded API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'api_key:' (with colon, empty password). Command: echo -n 'your_api_key:' | base64

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Chargebee user access to billing and subscription management

checks.name: Data Masking
checks.description: Verifies Chargebee customer data is accessible only via authenticated API with proper scoping
